records.content:
I have never met a cat I didn’t like.

Some cats accept me immediately. Others prefer a longer evaluation period. I respect both approaches.

When I am not caring for you, I moonlight as an atmospheric scientist at NCAR. This means I am calm, reliable, observant, and very good at following instructions given by your human.

Your home will be respected.

Your routine will be followed exactly.

Your trust will not be misplaced.

Your human may contact me to schedule a visit or a meet-and-greet.

Email: 

your@email.com

Phone/Text: (555) 555-5555

I look forward to meeting you.Or not. Either is acceptable.
In-home cat care in Louisville, Lafayette, and Boulder. Calm, reliable visits with photos for your human. Approved by cats.

Will you meet me first?Yes. Your approval is required.

Will you follow my routine exactly?Yes. Routines are not suggestions.

What if I hide?That is acceptable. I am very good at confirming your continued existence.

Will you give me medicine?Possibly. We will discuss this with your human.

records.content:
Your human is leaving.

They have tried to explain. You understand enough. The important thing is this: you will remain in your home, your routine will stay intact, and your standards will be upheld.

I am the Cat Nanny. I visit cats in Louisville, Lafayette, South Boulder, and East Boulder. I provide food, clean litter boxes, and companionship only when requested.

I do not rush. I do not force affection. I am prepared for judgment.

I will:

Make food appear

Offer play, petting, or quiet coexistence

Report to your human that all is well

records.content:
I will:

Do all of the above

Stay longer, if you permit

Provide additional playtime or calm company

Visits are adapted to your personality, not a checklist.

“She showed up on time. The food was correct. The litter box was acceptable.”— Milo, Louisville

“I hid under the bed. She did not force interaction. This was correct.”— Luna, South Boulder

“She understands the balance between play and solitude.”— Oliver, Lafayette

“Photos were sent. The unnecessary human anxiety decreased.”— Cleo, East Boulder

“She opened the food correctly on the first try.”— Shadow, Louisville

Testimonials translated from Cat.

Your human worries. This is expected.

I will send free photos and short videos so they know:

You are alive

You are fed

You remain in control of the situation

This service is for them. You may ignore it.
